query:
SELECT 
  cnj,
  status_original,
  status_resumido,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.status')) AS payload_status,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) AS payload_phase,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.situation')) AS payload_situation,
  LEFT(raw_payload, 200) AS payload_inicio
FROM processos
WHERE status_resumido = 'em_analise_inicial'
  AND status_original = 'Finalizado'
LIMIT 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user yf9iEUYDgMjHK2N.90ae4898ae71 --database FUtgBwVe3SdFnru4LzrCjK --execute SELECT 
  cnj,
  status_original,
  status_resumido,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.status')) AS payload_status,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) AS payload_phase,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.situation')) AS payload_situation,
  LEFT(raw_payload, 200) AS payload_inicio
FROM processos
WHERE status_resumido = 'em_analise_inicial'
  AND status_original = 'Finalizado'
LIMIT 3;
